headline: State Street (STT) Upgraded to Buy: What Does It Mean for the Stock?
summary: State Street (STT) has been upgraded to a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy), reflecting growing optimism about the company's earnings prospects. This might drive the stock higher in the near term.

headline: State Street profit rises 19% in Q1 2026
